summary: Inject the parent FK into dependent items before upsert (sync.go) and coalesce to parent_id when the typed FK column is absent (store.go coalesceFKValue).
reason: Dependent typed tables declare a NOT NULL '<parent>_id' column the API response does not carry, so typed inserts failed their constraint and rows fell back to the generic resources table only.
validated_outcome: Dependent rows land in their typed tables instead of only the generic resources table.
